series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of applications or correspondence associated with a foreign real estate dealer or salesperson license or the registration of foreign real estate. This retention schedule also includes enlarged plats and plans, videotapes, CD-ROMS, and DVD formats, consent to service of process forms or any Homeland Security Forms issued by the Ohio Department of Public Safety. These records may contain social security numbers which are not a matter of public record for purposes of Ohio Revised Code Section 149.03.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper copy is imaged and indexed on computer. Upon confirmation that paper copy was imaged and indexed on computer ; Microform: Images currently on microfiche are be retained one year final expiration of license or registration and ; Electronic: Images on computer are be retained one year final expiration of license or registration and
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Erase ; Electronic: Erase
